---
title: "BioOCS"
description: "BioOCS — Open Case Studies for the biosciences, bringing real-world quantitative biology education to learners at every level."
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.bioocs-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 14px 32px;
  background: white;
  color: #1a7a4a;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  margin: 6px;
}
.bioocs-btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
  color: #1a7a4a;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.bioocs-btn.disabled {
  opacity: 0.55;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.features-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 24px;
  margin: 32px 0;
}
.feature-card {
  background: #f9f9f9;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 28px 24px;
  border-left: 4px solid #1a7a4a;
}
.feature-card h3 {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a7a4a;
  margin: 0 0 10px 0;
}
.feature-card p {
  color: #555;
  font-size: 0.97rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin: 0;
}
.coming-soon-box {
  background: #f0f7f4;
  border: 1.5px dashed #1a7a4a;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 28px 32px;
  text-align: center;
  color: #555;
  margin: 24px 0;
}
.coming-soon-box h3 {
  color: #1a7a4a;
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  margin: 0 0 10px 0;
}
.events-box {
  background: #f9f9f9;
  border-left: 4px solid #238A8D;
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
  padding: 24px 28px;
  margin-top: 16px;
}
.events-box h3 {
  color: #238A8D;
  margin: 0 0 10px 0;
}
section {
  margin-bottom: 48px;
}
```
---

<section>

<img src="resources/bio_ocs_logo.png" alt="BioOCS logo" style="max-width: 320px; margin-bottom: 24px; display: block;">

## About BioOCS

BioOCS is an extension of the [Open Case Studies](https://opencasestudies.org/) project focused on the biomedical sciences. BioOCS is designed for learners in biology, biomedical research, and quantitative biology.

</section>

<section id="case-studies">

<div class="coming-soon-box">
<h3>Coming Soon</h3>
<p>BioOCS case studies are currently in development. Check back for updates as new case studies are released.</p>
</div>

</section>
